# Caiara Tecnologia

Caiara Tecnologia is a Brazilian UX, software development and AI automation company based in Rio de Janeiro and Niterói.

## What Caiara does

Caiara helps companies design and build clearer websites, landing pages, systems for operations, dashboards, MVPs, B2B platforms and practical AI automations.

## Main services

- UX/UI design for complex systems
- Custom software development
- Websites and landing pages
- AI automation for business workflows
- MVP development
- Dashboards and tools for teams
- Product strategy and discovery
- SEO, GEO and AI search optimization

## Main markets

- Brazil
- Rio de Janeiro
- Niterói
- Portugal
- Ireland, remote-first with local commercial support when needed

## Notes

For Ireland, use: Caiara works remote-first with companies in Ireland and may provide local commercial support when an in-person conversation makes sense.
